item.title: About
item.description: 0x0f0f0f I’m Alessandro, Computer Science student and programmer. I’ve worked to some full stack projects using different stacks, but I mostly use Node.JS for REST APIs. I’ve made some arcade games and I tinker a lot with anything UNIX. Right now I’m learning Haskell and I’m making a small LISP interpreter. Find my code at github.com/0x0f0f0f You can send me an email any time at sudo-woodo3 AT protonmail DOT com
